titleStmt.title: SII 25.74: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 74. (A.R. No. 74 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.
The record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 13th century.

This refers to an order issued by Nallappaṉ Paḍiyaṉ Aṅgarāyan to the tānattār of the temple of Kaṟaikaṇṭēśvaram-udaiya-nāyanār of Viḍāl in Agalūr-paṟṟu recording the grant of lands as iṟaiyili to meet the expenses of festival, food offerings and daily worship on the occassion of Kōdaṇḍarāmaṉ-sandi instituted in his name.
A number of tax terms and the boundaries of the gift land are mentioned. Mention may be made of a number of signatories who attested the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu viṭālpaṟṟāṉa vikkirama pāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu Akalūrppaṟṟil viṭālil nāyaṉāṟ koyiṟt tāṉat
tāṟku Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku nallappaṉpaṭiyaṉ Aṅkarāyaṉ namperāl kaṭṭiṉa kotaṇṭarāmaṉ cantikkum tirunāḷukkum Amutuppaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷ celavukkum Ikkoyil tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Ivvūr nāṉkellaikkum Uṭppaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nattam taricu
eri (ēri)vāypuṟavaṭai tiṭarkaḷar nirnilai maranilai Uḷḷiṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum patiṉmuṉṟāvatiṉ Etir muṉṟāvatu cittirai mātam mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākat tantu Ittāl varum kaṭamai poṉvari kāṇikkai kāttikaip paccai māvaṭai kuḷavaṭai kācāyavaṟkam kiṟṟuvari cantu vikkiramappeṟu vācal viṉivokam kūṟṟi
lakkai kaṭaik kūṭṭilakkai taṟi Iṟai cekku Iṟai taṭṭuppaṭṭi taṭṭārappāṭṭam Aricikkāṇam Āyavaṟkam makanmai ceṭṭippeṟu taccuttāḻvu Āḷamañci nāṭṭu viṉivokam Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyavaṟka‘ka’ is written below the line.ttu Iṟaikaḷum Upātikaḷum tevaikaḷum Uṭppaṭa mutal Aṭaṅkal Iṟaiyiliyāka variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻittu Itukku nic
ceyippāṉa poṉṉum Iṉṉāṭṭukku nicceyitta mutalile celaviṭuvatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Ivvūr kaikkoṇṭu candrātittavaraiyum cellak *kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittu Ivūrṉānkellaiyilum tiruccūlastāpaṉam paṇṇikkoṇṭu mutalaṭaṅkal Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittup pūcait
tirunāḷum tiruppaṇiyum tāḻvaṟa naṭattip potuka Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ teva viccātirapperumāḷ Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭuProbably the expression patiṉmūṉṟāvatiṉ etir mūṉṟu is to be found here.nāḷ 2 100 9 10 1 tulyamThis portion may conjectually be restored as viccātarap • śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 25.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
